video_info.title: Indian Idol
video_info.shortDescription: Indian Idol 16 – “Yaadon Ki Playlist” celebrates music that brings back cherished memories and emotions. For the first time ever, auditions go outdoors, traveling across India to discover raw talent, hosted by the legendary Udit Narayan, while Aditya Narayan returns as the main host. The judges - Vishal Dadlani, Shreya Ghoshal, and Badshah - search for voices that touch hearts. A season where every song is a memory, and every melody tells a story.
video_info.longDescription: Indian Idol 16 – “Yaadon Ki Playlist” celebrates music that brings back cherished memories and emotions. For the first time ever, auditions go outdoors, traveling across India to discover raw talent, hosted by the legendary Udit Narayan, while Aditya Narayan returns as the main host. The judges - Vishal Dadlani, Shreya Ghoshal, and Badshah - search for voices that touch hearts. A season where every song is a memory, and every melody tells a story.

video_info.title: Bundesliga 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: SC Freiburg host Bayer Leverkusen in a tense Bundesliga showdown at the Europa-Park Stadion. Freiburg aim to extend their strong home run, while Leverkusen balance league ambitions with Champions League commitments. Which team will prevail? Catch all the action from Bundesliga 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: Bundesliga 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: RB Leipzig host FC Augsburg in a Bundesliga Matchday 25 fixture at Red Bull Arena. Leipzig, pushing for Champions League spots around 5th place, face mid-table Augsburg in a matchup where home advantage could prove decisive. Catch all the action from Bundesliga 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: Bundesliga 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Mainz welcomes VfB Stuttgart to MEWA Arena for Bundesliga Matchday 25. Mid-table Mainz face a stern test against fourth-placed Stuttgart, who have already beaten them twice this season. Mainz sit 14th after rallying from a poor start, showing resilience at home. Stuttgart hold a top-four spot with a strong attack, eyeing Champions League qualification despite a tough run. Catch all the action from Bundesliga 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: Bundesliga 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: FC Heidenheim hosts TSG Hoffenheim in a Bundesliga Matchday 25 matchup at Voith-Arena. Bottom-placed Heidenheim face a tough challenge against third-placed Hoffenheim. Heidenheim sit last, struggling offensively and defensively. Hoffenheim remain strong in the top three. Find out who comes on top. Catch all the action from Bundesliga 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.
